function.name: capture_remote_image
function.description: Capture an image from an available remote camera in a specific region.

country.description: The country to source the camera from (e.g., 'US', 'GH').

function.name: scan_radio_spectrum
function.description: Request a radio scan from an allowed remote SDR receiver in a specific region.

country.description: The country to source the SDR from.

start_hz.description: The start frequency for the scan in Hz.

end_hz.description: The end frequency for the scan in Hz.

function.name: read_remote_sensor
function.description: Read environmental data from a remote IoT sensor.

sensor_type.description: The type of sensor reading needed.

location.description: The general location or region for the sensor.
